** Top level **
===============

A paragraph that is comfortably longer than seventy-two columns so that
the greedy word wrapper has to fold it onto a second physical line.

** Sub heading **
-----------------

See the release notes (https://example.com/notes) and the docs
(https://example.com/docs) for context.

- a bullet point that also runs well past the seventy-two column
  boundary to prove the continuation lines hang under the text rather
  than the marker
- short one

```ruby
def untouched(x)
  x * 2   # this fenced block must not be reflowed even if it is very very very long
end
```

| Canonical | Variants |
|-----------|----------|
| Foo | foo, FOO |
